image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if your sneeze could start a pandemic?
Context visual: It's all about R0, the reproduction number. If each case infects more than one other person...
Escalation visual: ...outbreaks can spiral out of control. Imagine a single infection leading to dozens.
Evidence visual: Research shows that accurate tracking of R0 is crucial. Misleading data can cause panic.
Payoff visual: So, understanding R0 helps us prepare, not sensationalize. Knowledge is power.
Cta visual: Stay informed, stay safe, and don't forget to follow for more science insights!
